name: scope-hammer
description: Ruthlessly compress brainstorm output into a shippable MVP — classify ideas as DELETE / MOCK / ALREADY EXISTS / SHIP and surface the shortest path to launch.

interface.shortDescription: Ruthlessly compress brainstorm output into a shippable MVP — classify ideas as DELETE / MOCK / ALREADY EXISTS / SHIP and surface the shortest path to launch.
interface.longDescription: Ruthlessly compress brainstorm output into a shippable MVP — classify ideas as DELETE / MOCK / ALREADY EXISTS / SHIP and surface the shortest path to launch. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Apply the scope hammer to this brainstorm or feature list. Classify everything as DELETE, MOCK, ALREADY EXISTS, or SHIP. Give me the shortest path to a launchable MVP.
